name: Slam
description: Slams the foe with a tail or vine

name: Fire Spin
description: Traps the foe in a ring of fire

name: Gust
description: Whips up a strong gust of wind

name: Sleep Powder
description: May cause the foe to sleep

name: Bug Bite
description: Bites the foe with sharp mandibles

name: Psybeam
description: Fires a beam of psychic energy

name: Rock Throw
description: Throws small rocks at the foe

name: Double Kick
description: Kicks the foe twice in a row
